dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 06, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
"Shane McClanahan Leads Rays to Shutout Win, Dodgers Blast Astros in Blowout"

In a shutout victory, the Tampa Bay Rays took down the Toronto Blue Jays 3-0 behind a solid staff effort that included a strong start from Shane McClanahan, who pitched 5.2 innings with 4 strikeouts and no earned runs. Meanwhile, the Los Angeles Dodgers dominated the Houston Astros 12-2, with Andy Pages leading the way, hitting three home runs and driving in six runs. Pages' power surge was part of a team effort that saw seven Dodgers players record multiple hits.

In another game, the Milwaukee Brewers edged the St. Louis Cardinals 6-2, with Andrew Vaughn hitting a home run and driving in three runs. The Atlanta Braves fell to the Seattle Mariners 3-1, with Bryan Woo pitching a complete game and recording 9 strikeouts.
